revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:文化庁); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == <!-- Source: ja:Talk:文化庁 | revid=14997643 --> 文化庁による「バッチギ」に対する３０００万円の援助にも言及して欲しいと思います。{{Unsigned-IPuser|203.140.180.141|2007年6月17日 10:55}} :それが百科事典に記述すべき内容であると判断するのであれば、ご自分で書けばよいでしょう。記述の際は[[WP:V]]と[[WP:NPOV]]に気をつけてください。--[[利用者:124.96.234.159|124.96.234.159]] 2007年6月17日 (日) 11:05 (UTC)
<!-- Dummy comment to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page. -->

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:文化庁, en:Agency for Cultural Affairs); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) 文化庁による「バッチギ」に対する３０００万円の援助にも言及して欲しいと思います。{{Unsigned-IPuser|203.140.180.141|2007年6月17日 10:55}} :それが百科事典に記述すべき内容であると判断するのであれば、ご自分で書けばよいでしょう。記述の際は[[WP:V]]と[[WP:NPOV]]に気をつけてください。--[[利用者:124.96.234.159|124.96.234.159]] 2007年6月17日 (日) 11:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=Mid|culture=y|law=y}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Agency for Cultural Affairs]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=787852906 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 23:19, 27 June 2017 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:文化庁ロゴ.svg|文化庁ロゴ.svg]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files uploaded by Luke atlas|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 16:22, 16 May 2022 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:文化庁, en:Agency for Cultural Affairs); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/14997643 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) 文化庁による「バッチギ」に対する３０００万円の援助にも言及して欲しいと思います。{{Unsigned-IPuser|203.140.180.141|2007年6月17日 10:55}} :それが百科事典に記述すべき内容であると判断するのであれば、ご自分で書けばよいでしょう。記述の際は[[WP:V]]と[[WP:NPOV]]に気をつけてください。--[[利用者:124.96.234.159|124.96.234.159]] 2007年6月17日 (日) 11:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198160199 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=Mid|culture=y|law=y}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Agency for Cultural Affairs]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=787852906 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 23:19, 27 June 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:文化庁ロゴ.svg|文化庁ロゴ.svg]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files uploaded by Luke atlas|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 16:22, 16 May 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:文化庁, en:Agency for Cultural Affairs); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:42, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:09, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/14997643 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) 文化庁による「バッチギ」に対する３０００万円の援助にも言及して欲しいと思います。{{Unsigned-IPuser|203.140.180.141|2007年6月17日 10:55}} :それが百科事典に記述すべき内容であると判断するのであれば、ご自分で書けばよいでしょう。記述の際は[[WP:V]]と[[WP:NPOV]]に気をつけてください。--[[利用者:124.96.234.159|124.96.234.159]] 2007年6月17日 (日) 11:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198160199 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=Mid|culture=y|law=y}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Agency for Cultural Affairs]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=787852906 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 23:19, 27 June 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:文化庁ロゴ.svg|文化庁ロゴ.svg]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files uploaded by Luke atlas|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 16:22, 16 May 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:13, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:46, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/14997643 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) 文化庁による「バッチギ」に対する３０００万円の援助にも言及して欲しいと思います。{{Unsigned-IPuser|203.140.180.141|2007年6月17日 10:55}} :それが百科事典に記述すべき内容であると判断するのであれば、ご自分で書けばよいでしょう。記述の際は[[WP:V]]と[[WP:NPOV]]に気をつけてください。--[[User:124.96.234.159|124.96.234.159]] 2007年6月17日 (日) 11:05 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198160199 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=Mid|culture=y|law=y}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Agency for Cultural Affairs]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=787852906 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf *Added archive http://www.webcitation.org/6h4vG9qyE?url=http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf to http://www.bunka.go.jp/english/about_us/policy_of_cultural_affairs/pdf/2015_policy.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 23:19, 27 June 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:文化庁ロゴ.svg|文化庁ロゴ.svg]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files uploaded by Luke atlas|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 16:22, 16 May 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC)
